## Suggested Agent Workflow

- Claude Code defines behavior-preserving scope.
- Claude Code creates a Codex handoff task.
- Codex implements and verifies unchanged behavior.
- CI provides feedback.
- Claude Code reviews locally after PR creation.
- Human approves and merges.
